original_image_tags: Black-and-white photograph showing a metallic, disc-shaped object. The object is roughly circular with a central hub containing four distinct circular openings or indentations arranged in a square pattern. There are visible attachments or protrusions on the rim, appearing to be mounting brackets or connectors. The object is positioned on a dark horizontal surface, possibly a table edge or shelf, with a light-colored vertical background behind it. To the lower left on the light surface, a small rectangular dark tag or label is visible with the number "24" on it.

elements.description: Black and white photograph of an interior space, likely an attic or crawlspace. Depicts a circular metallic object resembling a hubcap or disc with a central pattern of five holes, positioned above a dark horizontal wooden beam. A small, indistinct piece of debris or material is attached to the top edge of the disc. In the lower left, a small rectangular object, possibly a matchbook or card, rests on a light-colored surface. The background consists of light-colored panels or boards.
